title: Forty McCarthy Tétrault Lawyers Recognized for Technology and Health Sciences Expertise in Lexpert Special Edition
content:
## Forty McCarthy Tétrault Lawyers Recognized for Technology and Health Sciences Expertise in Lexpert Special Edition
Lexpert has named 40 McCarthy Tétrault practitioners as “leading lawyers” in its Special Edition: Technology and Health Sciences 2024, highlighting our industry expertise and innovative work helping clients seize opportunities in these transformative sectors.
This year's rankings celebrate our firm's outstanding client advice in the following areas, including: Computer and IT law, data protection and privacy, intellectual property, life sciences and health, intellectual property litigation, technology transactions, telecommunications, banking and financial institutions, class actions, corporate commercial law, corporate finance and securities, corporate mid-market, corporate commercial litigation, product liability litigation and private equity.
The following McCarthy Tétrault  practitioners were recognized as leading lawyers:
- Charles-Antoine Soulière
- Véronique Wattiez Larose
Access the Lexpert Special Edition: Technology and Health Sciences 2024 publication.
McCarthy Tétrault is dedicated to helping clients achieve success on their most important and complex legal matters. Lexpert ’s consistent recognition of our team in key industries reinforces our reputation as innovators and multidisciplinary leaders across Canada and internationally.
Our Technology Group
The firm drives significant value for our clients because we have undertaken the widest range of leading-edge technology transactions across industry sectors. Acting for domestic and international clients, we know the players and we know what motivates them in a commercial negotiation or dispute, so we can develop proactive strategies that deliver on client objectives. Technology transactions aren’t only about circuits or code. They create relationships, the success of which hinge on achieving business objectives while successfully allocating and managing risk. Our Technology practice, Canada’s largest and deepest, operates at this intersection of legal, business and technology sector savvy and experience. Learn more about our Technology expertise.
Our Health Industry Group
Now more than ever, healthcare organizations need exceptional legal strategies and innovative business solutions that mitigate risk and maximize opportunities. Our Health Industry Group provides a single access point to our top practitioners in all relevant sectors who will work closely with your team to provide practical solutions to your most complex issues. We help industry players remain competitive and compliant – and capitalize on the transformational opportunities that are emerging as the industry reimagines its service model to provide more flexible and affordable care. Find out how our Health Industry team can help you.
About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The Firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the Firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information, or to request an interview with a McCarthy Tétrault lawyer, please contact:
